calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James K. Kawahito, Esq. of Kawahito Law Group, T:310.746.5300, for plaintiff/moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'s Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment as follows:

Plaintiff Center for Advanced Public Awareness, Inc.'s motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendants Dollar Tree Stores, Inc. and Greenbrier International, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order that repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and a proposed consent judgment signed by all parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.
